ValidationRule.description: If Status = Assigned, Approved or Transferred, then Payment Method is required
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( TEXT( Status__c ) = "Assigned" && ISBLANK(TEXT(Payment_Method__c)), TEXT( Status__c ) = "Approved" && ISBLANK(TEXT(Payment_Method__c)), TEXT( Status__c ) = "Transferred" && ISBLANK(TEXT(Payment_Method__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If Status = Assigned, Approved or Transferred, then Payment Method is required
